headline: Global Anesthesia and Respiratory Devices Market Size/Share Worth USD 100.5 Billion by 2035 at a 5.8% CAGR: Healthcare Foresights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, SWOT Analysis)
summary: [220+ Pages Latest Report] According to a market research study published by Healthcare Foresights, the demand analysis of Global Anesthesia and Respiratory Devices Market size & share revenue was valued at approximately USD 57.2 Billion in 2025 and is expected to reach USD 60.5 Billion in 2026 and is expected to reach around USD 100.5 Billion by 2035, at a CAGR of 5.8% between 2026 and 2035. The key market players listed in the report with their sales, revenues and strategies are Medtronic, O2
